mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, session_id, disease_code, disease_name, confidence, rank_no, risk_level, evidence_json, is_display_to_patient, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM diagnosis_result WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diagnosis_result ( tenant_id, session_id, disease_code, disease_name, confidence, rank_no, risk_level, evidence_json, is_display_to_patient ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{sessionId}, #{diseaseCode}, #{diseaseName}, #{confidence}, #{rankNo}, #{riskLevel}, #{evidenceJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{isDisplayToPatient} )
mapper.update: UPDATE diagnosis_result SET session_id = #{sessionId}, disease_code = #{diseaseCode}, disease_name = #{diseaseName}, confidence = #{confidence}, rank_no = #{rankNo}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, evidence_json = #{evidenceJson, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, is_display_to_patient = #{isDisplayToPatient} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
